hooks.command: cd D:/dungeon-cortex && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20

python3 -c "import sys,json,os; inp=sys.stdin.read(); p=json.loads(inp).get('file_path','') if inp.strip() else ''; blocked='.env' in os.path.basename(p) and not p.endswith('.example'); sys.exit(1) if blocked else sys.exit(0)" <<< "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"
